applicability_notes: ttnn_replacement: ttnn.logit(input_tensor_a, eps=eps); constraints: ['eps is an optional scalar; eps=None maps directly to torch.special.logit with no clamping (non-finite outputs possible outside (0,1))', 'for eps > 0.5 the golden uses a manual clamp(1-eps, eps) + log(x/(1-x)) to avoid platform-dependent UB in torch.special.logit', 'unary op: single input tensor, elementwise, shape-preserving']; fusion_notes: Replaces the contiguous subsequence clamp -> div(x, 1-x) -> log (or a direct torch.special.logit call) with a single ttnn.logit kernel.

placement_observations.source: unit test: ttnn.from_torch(in_data, dtype=ttnn_dtype, layout=ttnn.TILE_LAYOUT, device=device) with default (DRAM interleaved) memory config
unit test: no explicit output memory_config passed; inherits default DRAM interleaved
